response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust development in routing, navigation, or geospatial data pipelines — critical for this role. Their C++ exposure is limited to academic/legacy NI LabWindows work, and their GIS projects use DLang and Node.js, not the required systems-level languages or routing tile optimization domains.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project experience with GISCollective
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Demonstrated expertise in distributed systems and low-latency applications
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or navigation data pipelines
Geospatial work uses DLang/Node.js, not the required C++/Rust stack
Lacks demonstrated experience with routing tile generation or map data optimization
